## Summary

Describe the change in plain terms.

## Change Type

- [ ] Code
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Governance / registry
- [ ] Release / packaging

## Evidence

- [ ] Tests pass locally
- [ ] CI expected to pass
- [ ] New or changed behavior is covered by tests
- [ ] No authority or production-readiness claim is made without receipts

## Authority Boundary

This PR does not convert architecture, specification, or declared success into authority. Promotion requires passing tests, reproducible evidence, and explicit receipts.
